allowedFamilies.name: git-read-only

allowedPatterns: rev-parse, remote -v, branch, bounded log, status, diff, ls-files, and show
deniedPatterns: configuration, index, worktree, history, tag, and remote mutation

constraints: Allow rev-parse, remote -v, branch --show-current, bounded log, status, and diff inspection.
Reject configuration changes and every worktree, index, history, or remote mutation.
